verses.text: On the mount He is transfigured; His face shines as the sun, and Moses and Elias appear with Him. Glory unveiled. For a moment the hidden majesty of Christ shines forth.
On the mount He is transfigured; His face shines as the sun, and Moses and Elias appear with Him. Glory unveiled. For a moment the hidden majesty of Christ shines forth.
On the mount He is transfigured; His face shines as the sun, and Moses and Elias appear with Him. Glory unveiled. For a moment the hidden majesty of Christ shines forth.
Peter would build three tents; a bright cloud overshadows, and a voice says, 'This is my beloved Son... hear ye him.' The Father's word. Above the law and prophets, hear the Son.
Peter would build three tents; a bright cloud overshadows, and a voice says, 'This is my beloved Son... hear ye him.' The Father's word. Above the law and prophets, hear the Son.
The disciples fall afraid; Jesus touches them, 'Arise, be not afraid'; they see 'no man, save Jesus only.' Christ alone. When the glory fades, the Saviour Himself remains.
The disciples fall afraid; Jesus touches them, 'Arise, be not afraid'; they see 'no man, save Jesus only.' Christ alone. When the glory fades, the Saviour Himself remains.
The disciples fall afraid; Jesus touches them, 'Arise, be not afraid'; they see 'no man, save Jesus only.' Christ alone. When the glory fades, the Saviour Himself remains.
He bids them tell the vision after His rising; Elias is come already, meaning John. Forerunner fulfilled. John came in the spirit of Elijah to prepare the way.
He bids them tell the vision after His rising; Elias is come already, meaning John. Forerunner fulfilled. John came in the spirit of Elijah to prepare the way.

He bids them tell the vision after His rising; Elias is come already, meaning John. Forerunner fulfilled. John came in the spirit of Elijah to prepare the way.
A father kneels for his lunatic son, whom the disciples could not cure. Helpless need. He brings to Christ what others failed to heal.
A father kneels for his lunatic son, whom the disciples could not cure. Helpless need. He brings to Christ what others failed to heal.
A father kneels for his lunatic son, whom the disciples could not cure. Helpless need. He brings to Christ what others failed to heal.
'O faithless and perverse generation,' how long shall I bear you? He rebukes the devil, and the child is cured. Power over evil. Christ accomplishes at once what unbelief could not.
'O faithless and perverse generation,' how long shall I bear you? He rebukes the devil, and the child is cured. Power over evil. Christ accomplishes at once what unbelief could not.
Why could they not cast it out? 'Because of your unbelief'; this kind goes out by prayer and fasting. Faith's failure. Spiritual victories need a faith fed by prayer.
Why could they not cast it out? 'Because of your unbelief'; this kind goes out by prayer and fasting. Faith's failure. Spiritual victories need a faith fed by prayer.
Why could they not cast it out? 'Because of your unbelief'; this kind goes out by prayer and fasting. Faith's failure. Spiritual victories need a faith fed by prayer.
He foretells again His betrayal, death, and rising; they are exceeding sorry. Sorrow, not hope. They grasp the death but not yet the resurrection.
He foretells again His betrayal, death, and rising; they are exceeding sorry. Sorrow, not hope. They grasp the death but not yet the resurrection.
Asked of tribute, He bids Peter find a coin in a fish's mouth, to pay 'lest we should offend them.' Gracious yielding. The Lord of all pays the tax to avoid needless offence.
